narrative:
Millcreek-West Unity Lsd (Williams) school district has 2,358 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.8 percentage points.
